powers.stats: Cost: 1 V (Order of Sir Martin Only); only affects other Leper Knights with concrete reasons for mistrust  •  Pool: -  •  Reflexive  •  Scene

powers.name: Oath of Fealty
powers.effect: Draw Invictus Status in Vitae weekly from liege without feeding. Liege knows when you lie.

powers.name: Oath of the Hard Motherfucker
powers.effect: Kill a Carthian or oathbreaker for Invictus Status 1, Friends in High Places 1, 9-Again on two Skills, and Allies/Contacts/Resources 1. All stripped if broken.

powers.name: Oath of the Safe Word
powers.effect: Share Willpower and one Social Merit with oath partner. Either can end to briefly paralyse the other.

powers.name: Oath of the True Knight
powers.effect: Impartial covenant defender. Can't consume Vitae from any source; can't be woken from torpor by blood. Invictus Status protects from mental Disciplines and Kindred/ghoul attacks.

powers.name: The Taste of Things Lived
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V (reflexive for insight) (Mnemosyne Only)  •  Pool: 7  •  Reflexive  •  Scene
powers.effect: Feeding creates artificial blood ties (+2 Social vs target; Twice Removed for Blood Sympathy). Sever for 1 WP. Can effect blood ties with Touch of Shadow. Spend 1 V: +1 Mental per applicable human/vampire within 100 metres.

powers.name: The Exchange of Things Past
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V (Mnemosyne Only); blood tie to target; replaces The Lying Mind  •  Pool: 12  v Resolve + BP  •  Contested  •  Scene / Permanent (elective)
powers.effect: Exchange memories with target. For each memory taken, must give one of equal length. Both gain False Memories condition. After scene, own memories return but exchanged memories remain, or elect to make permanent. Traumatic memories: vampire rolls Fear Frenzy, mortal Resolve + Composure or Shaken.

powers.name: Mantle of Amorous Fire
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V 1 Successes  •  Pool: 11  •  Ritual  •  Scene
powers.effect: Dance to exhaustion. Add Cruac as a Presence bonus for the night.

powers.name: Wisdom of the Soul

powers.effect: Reveal if mortal/vampire/ghoul; Humanity rating; diablerie

powers.effect: Blend into surroundings, visible but unnoticeable. Predatory aura fully on or off. Leaving combat: Wits + Composure - Obfuscate to notice; auto Clash of Wills vs Auspex.

powers.name: Touch of Shadow
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V  •  Pool: 7  •  Instant  •  Scene
powers.effect: Cast Face in the Crowd on object or person. Free and unlimited duration on carried/worn objects if not drawing attention.

powers.name: Cloak of Night
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V  •  Pool: -  •  None
powers.effect: Become invisible. Leaving combat: auto Clash of Wills vs Auspex 2.

powers.name: The Familiar Stranger
powers.stats: Cost: 2 V  •  Pool: -  •  None
powers.effect: Disguise self or other as a desired person. Free unlimited duration to reskin carried/worn objects, but no equipment bonus without Vitae.

powers.name: Oubliette
powers.stats: Cost: Free (Haven) / 3-9 V & 1 WP  •  Pool: -  •  Instant  •  1 week per BP
powers.effect: Always active on Haven/Safe Place at no cost. Further uses at standard cost. Use Obfuscate at distance on anything in area.

banes.name: Tenebrous Curse
banes.effect: Gain an extra bane at Humanity 6 (doesn't count towards cap); Humanity counts –1 for all Humanity-based banes.

willpower.mask_1wp: Convince someone to deny logic because of your word.
willpower.mask_all: Risk exile or death to defend your cult's belief system.
willpower.dirge_1wp: Punish yourself for a mistake.
willpower.dirge_all: Risk death to correct an egregious error in judgement.

powers.name: Beast's Hackles
powers.stats: Cost: Free (1 V for Insight)  •  Pool: - - Composure & Closed Book  •  Instant  •  Scene
powers.effect: Add Auspex dots to any rolls to resist surprise. Access to Tier 1 Auspex Insight questions.

powers.name: Dread Presence
powers.stats: Cost: -  •  Pool: -  •  Instant  •  Scene
powers.effect: Conjure brief illusions. Improve Intimidation. Prevent foes spending Willpower.

powers.name: Face of the Beast
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V  •  Pool: 12  v Composure + BP  •  Contested  •  Instant
powers.effect: Impose Frightened Condition. Cause fleeing.

powers.name: Grand Delusion
powers.stats: Cost: 2 V  •  Pool: 11  v Composure + BP  •  Contested  •  1 night
powers.effect: Impose Delusional Condition.

powers.name: Waking Nightmare
powers.stats: Cost: 1 V  •  Pool: 12  v highest Composure + BP  •  Contested  •  Scene
powers.effect: Create and control hallucinations.

banes.name: Lonely Curse
banes.effect: With mortals, Humanity counts –2; Presence/Manipulation failures become dramatic failures. Intimidation and Subterfuge unaffected.

banes.name: Plague of Purity
banes.effect: Touch by Integrity 8+ mortal causes (10 – Humanity) bashing damage.
